## NIM Model Router v0.3.0

Cost-aware routing, stronger fallbacks, and better observability.

### Highlights
- **Cost tracking** — `X-NIM-Estimated-Cost-USD` header, `/v1/router/stats` totals, Prometheus `nim_router_estimated_cost_usd_total`
- **Smarter routing** — low-confidence expensive tasks downgrade to `general`; system-prompt coding detection
- **More resilient** — 429 rate limits trigger fallback to the next model in the chain
- **Better DX** — `X-NIM-Fallback-Used` header, optional CORS via `ROUTER_CORS_ORIGINS`

### Install

```bash
pip install nim-model-router==0.3.0
```

Or from source:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/cobusgreyling/nim-model-router.git
cd nim-model-router
git checkout v0.3.0
pip install -e .
nim-router serve
```

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/cobusgreyling/nim-model-router/blob/v0.3.0/CHANGELOG.md) for the full list.
